name: Adtalem Global Education Inc.
description: Adtalem Global Education Inc. is a leading healthcare educator and provider of professional education. The company operates a portfolio of institutions, including Chamberlain University, Ross University School of Medicine, Ross University School of Veterinary Medicine, and American University of the Caribbean School of Medicine. Adtalem is dedicated to addressing critical workforce shortages in healthcare by providing high-quality, flexible, and outcomes-oriented education to students and professionals globally.
